narrative:
24 Ohio Senate district has 245,916 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.2% D−R vs +8.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
